evidence.evidence_text: Synthesis and characterization of ﬂy ash modiﬁed mine tailings-based geopolymers Lianyang Zhang a,⇑, Saeed Ahmari a, Jinhong Zhang b a Department of Civil Engineering and Engineering Mechanics, University of Arizona, Tucson, AZ, USA b Department of Mining and Geological Engineering, University of Arizona, Tucson, AZ, USA article info Article history: Received 9 January 2011 Received in revised form 16 March 2011 Accepted 11 April 2011 Available online 4 May 2011 Keywords: Mine tailings Fly ash G
UCS of fly ash modified mine-tailings geopolymers is plotted in Fig. 4 for curing time, fly ash content, and NaOH concentration; packet text lacks numeric values.

review_queue.question: Digitize or inspect the source figure/table to recover mixture-level compressive-strength values.
review_queue.suggested_action: Open the PDF page images and extract numeric strength values only if mixture labels, age, unit, and values can be confirmed.

main_risks: Compressive-strength values are not directly readable from packet text.
